utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget (6 total). The final property solution includes all six items. Each is fully specified: 
1. property – includes name, type, bedrooms, location, and price (complete details). 
2. financing – includes solution type, down payment, interest rate, mortgage term, and processing fees (complete details). 
3. legal_services – includes service name and cost (complete). 
4. moving_services – includes service level, packing inclusion, and cost (complete). 
5. setup_services – includes utility_package and property_survey each with type/service_name, details, and cost (fully specified). 
6. total_budget – includes all cost breakdown elements (property cost, down payment, fees, service costs, and total calculations). All items from the format are present and fully detailed.
